columns.team: NFL team abbreviation -- normalized to this project's convention (nflverse's own 'LA' renamed to 'LAR', see capture/sources/nflverse.py)
columns.attempts: team pass attempts that game -- used with carries for plays-per-game and pass rate
133 columns total from nflreadpy's load_team_stats(); does NOT include Vegas season win totals (a betting-market product, no free source found -- D-006) or O-line rank (not a raw stat) -- get_team_context reports both as genuinely unavailable rather than guessing
